strategyResults.output: Test Files 83 passed; Tests 1142 passed | 4 skipped (1146); Duration 5.55s
strategyResults.details: +26 net tests vs 1116 baseline. 10 in run-state.test.ts, 16 net in run-manager.test.ts.

criteriaResults.description: RunManager class with new methods + preserved isRunning/getStatus shims
criteriaResults.evidence: run-manager.ts:50-237: isRunning(59), getStatus(70), getRun(84), listActiveRuns(91), abortRun(99), startRun(129), load(213). Singleton export at 237.

criteriaResults.description: startRun writes state.json synchronously before returning; required fields present
criteriaResults.evidence: run-manager.ts:154 awaits writeRunState before fire-and-forget at 157. State at 142-149 has runId/task/status/startedAt/progress/projectRoot. Tests 176-205 verify immediately on return.
src/state/run-state.ts:41-53 — temp name with pid+timestamp+4-byte random hex, writeFile, rename. 100-concurrent stress test at run-state.test.ts:73-88 confirms no partial writes.

criteriaResults.description: load() reconciles orphaned running→failed with reason
criteriaResults.evidence: run-manager.ts:213-232: sets status='failed', error='orchestrator crashed before completion', persists. 5 tests at run-manager.test.ts:424-512 cover orphan flip, no-modify completed, populate from disk, no-runs-dir, persisted reconciled state.
isRunning walks Map (59-61); getStatus returns max-startedAt (70-79). bober_run + bober_status schemas unchanged. Concurrent-startRun test at 157-173 confirms no throw on parallel calls.

criteriaResults.description: All strategies pass; 1116 baseline tests remain green
criteriaResults.evidence: typecheck/lint/build/test all exit 0. 1142 pass, 4 pre-existing skipped.

summary: All 6 required criteria pass and all 4 strategies clean. The RunManager refactor correctly implements concurrent-run support with atomic disk persistence, crash-recovery orphan reconciliation, and fully preserved bober_run/bober_status back-compat. +26 net tests, 100-concurrent-write stress test included. No regressions, no nonGoal violations.
